pmnt_heading_kyc: I am selected for a KYC review
select_language: Please select your language in the field below for payment instruction adapted to where you're from.
pmnt_intro: We only accept payments with cryptocurrency as the base. It is however, easy to buy and send Bitcoin (BTC) with a normal bank account. We cannot accept card directly from our customers because it does not satisfy our demands to anonymity for you as a customer, and for us as a supplier. The first step is to register with a crypto supplier. This can be compared to opening a bank acount with any bank. The second step is to deposit traditional currency, and then transfer the currency to bitcoin. The last step is to transfer the aquired bitcoin to our bitcoin account
pmnt_intro2: In the drop-down menus below, you will find information and guidance to each suggested crypto supplier. We will give you an overview of who they are, their advantages and disadvantages, and guide you through the order process. Please note that if there is a flag icon on the supplier, it means that the supplier can only be used by people located in the country of the flag. It is very important to follow the payment guide carefully. If you already have bitcoin ready at any other supplier, you can copy the destination wallet and address on the bottom of this site.
pmnt_intro3: Important! Our payment guide is constantly changing. Please read carefully, even if you're a returning customer.
pmnt_guide_advantage_moonpay_2: Asks for identification papers in only 5% of their transactions.
pmnt_guide_disadvantage_moonpay_1: Most expensive option, with 15% added fee to the amount you're transferring.
pmnt_guide_advantage_coinbase_1: Medium difficulty. As quick or quicker than Moonpay.
pmnt_guide_advantage_coinbase_2: Large, well-known and user-friendly American Crypto supplier.
pmnt_guide_advantage_coinbase_3: The cheapest of them all (between 3% and 8% deposit fee + a varying but very low tranfer fee.)
pmnt_guide_disadvantage_coinbase_1: Demands a photo of drivers license or passport the first time you use their services. Please note that we do not receive any of this information.
pmnt_guide_disadvantage_firi_4: Firi stopper overførsler, og sperrer for overføring av penger de mistenker skal til IPTV. Dette gjør de utelukkende basert på beløp (mange gjenkjennbare beløp). Du er fortsatt anonym, men det kan ta tid å få overført via Firi, og du risikerer kontoen din sperret om de ikke tror på deg. Vi anbefaler Coinbase i stedet.
pmnt_guide_advantage_firi_1: Instant registration and deposits with Vipps or card. Bank transfers has no fee (but takes 1-3 days).
pmnt_guide_advantage_firi_2: Norwegian Crypto Supplier, registered with the Norwegian Government. Easy to use.
pmnt_guide_advantage_firi_3: Normally takes approximately 60-120 minutes to finish a transfer.
pmnt_guide_disadvantage_firi_1: Medium to high fee level. 4% on deposits and a fixed transfer fee of about 10 euros.
pmnt_guide_disadvantage_firi_2: Has the most strict control systems of transactions.
pmnt_guide_disadvantage_firi_3: Even if deposits are instant, transferring it forward can in some cases take up to 72 hours if the users are picked out for a check (happens in 5% of transactions).
pmnt_guide_advantage_safello_1: Instant registration and deposit with Swedish BankID and Swish.
pmnt_guide_advantage_safello_3: Average fee level. About 7-8% of the order amount.
pmnt_guide_firi_info_1: Firi is a Norwegian crypto supplier that offers easy deposits and transactions. You deposit using Vipps, Card or bank transfer. Bank transfers are free, but takes 1-3 workdays. Deposits with Vipps and Card costs 4% on the top of the amount you're depositing. In addition to this, for each transfer, Firi charges a fixed sum of 0.0005 BTC (approx. 10 euros). Because of this, we recommend you to add at least 10 euros plus 4% of the total amount to have enough to finish your order. The amount you deposit over the amount your sending, stays in your Firi wallet until next time you use their services.
pmnt_guide_firi_info_2: Firi has the most strict KYC-checking processes of all our recommended suppliers. KYC stands for Know Your Customers, which is something all financial institutions that handles any transfer of money are forced to implement in varying degrees. They have to ask where the customer get their money, such as by salary, pension. These processes also applies to any regular bank.
pmnt_guide_firi_info_3: The questions they ask are not dangerous to answer, but if they know that the money goes to somethign illegal, they will refuse to finish the transaction. Because of how Bitcoin work, they are totally dependant on an honest answer from you to know where the money goes to. They can not in any way check what the transaction goes to. The address you send to is 100% anonymous, and cannot be traced by Firi or any other institution.
pmnt_guide_firi_kyc_1:
You will receive an email with questions you need to answer on. Answer honestly, except for the following questions: 
Where the money goes to: Answer that the money are going to your own crypto wallet which you control yourself. 
What platform the money are going to: Answer that the money are going to your own wallet on the platform Electrum.
pmnt_guide_firi_step_1: Download Firi's app on iOS or Android.
pmnt_guide_firi_step_2: Register, and find the button 'Deposit Money'. Choose VIPPS and identify yourself. Find the button 'Sett inn penger' and add the order amount, and add also the fee's (look above).
pmnt_guide_firi_step_3: When you have deposited and received money on Firi, you need to buy Bitcoin (BTC) for the entirety of the amount deposited.
pmnt_guide_firi_step_4: Find the function 'Send' within the app.
pmnt_guide_firi_step_5: Fill out the destination address and amount according to the information on the very bottom of this page.
pmnt_guide_moonpay_info1: Moonpay lets you order crypto directly with card, and transfer the bought amount directly to any crypto wallet. This makes the process smoother and easier than any other option. While finishing the order, you will be asked where your money comes from, and approximately 5% of their customers are asked to show a copy of their drivers license or passport. This is according to international regulations all vendors handling money are forced to use. You will for instance be asked the same sort of questions when you become a customer in any bank. Answering honestly does not comprimize your anonymity.
pmnt_guide_moonpay_step2: Fill out the BTC-amount that you find at the bottom of this page.
pmnt_guide_moonpay_step3: Click next. Fill out, and complete any information Moonpay asks for. We do not receive any of this information.
pmnt_guide_moonpay_step4: When Moonpay ask for 'Wallet Address' or 'Destination Wallet Address', fill out the address at the very bottom of this page.
pmnt_guide_moonpay_step5: Now that the transfer is ordered at Moonpay, it is up to them to process it. Normally it takes approximately 10 minutes, and your order will be automatically fulfilled the second it is processed.
pmnt_guide_moonpay_extra1: Important! You must fill out the order amount in the field for Bitcoin, not in the field of traditional currency. The Moonpay amount will be higher than the order amount because of Moonpays fee level.
pmnt_guide_moonpay_extra2: Important: Fill out the bitcoin address at the bottom of this page. Do not choose 'MoonPay Account'.
pmnt_guide_whatnow_info1: Now that your transfer is ordered at your seleceted payment supplier, it is up to the supplier to complete the transaction. Normally it takes between 10 and 120 minutes, and most often in the lower part of this scale. When your supplier has completed the transaction, you will receive your details by email.
pmnt_guide_altcoin_info1: If you wish to transfer from a different bitcoin-supplier than listed above, you can copy the amount and btc address directly at the bottom of this page. Please make sure any fee that your provider demands are not deducted from our part of the transaction. If your invoice is not paid in its entirety, we will not open your subscription until the remainder is paid.
pmnt_guide_altcoin_info2: If you want to use any type of Altcoin, please select Altcoins int he menu below. After that you will find that the overview of amount and adress is replaced by altcoin payment info. Please note that this is a transfer service run by a third party. Any questions about your altcoin-transaction must be directed to them.
pmnt_guide_coinbase_info1: Coinbase is an American crypto exchange that is the most economical of the options we have suggested. As with all banks, you have to provide identification before you can open an account and transfer money. This is normal practice, and remember that no one can track what you actually spend the money on. Bitcoin has a public, but at the same time 100% anonymous way of paying. This means that the transaction itself can be found, but it is impossible to identify exactly what and to whom the money is transferred.
pmnt_guide_coinbase_step1: Download the Coinbase app to your phone
pmnt_guide_coinbase_step2: Open the app, and follow the instructions for registration.
pmnt_guide_coinbase_step3: At the home screen, click 'Buy'. You will in the next steps asked to identify yourself with drivers license or passport. (It varies somewhat where in the process they ask for this)
pmnt_guide_coinbase_step5: Press 'Add payment method' (If you have already added a card, select a card from the list below)
pmnt_guide_coinbase_step7: Where you enter amount, make sure you enter the amount in Bitcoin you are going to buy, not in Euro. (Use the exchange icon just below the field)
pmnt_guide_coinbase_step8: Enter the amount in Bitcoin you want to buy. (You can find what you need to send us at the very bottom of this page)
pmnt_guide_coinbase_step9: Press 'Review order' and complete the purchase. (Note that this is where you are deducted between 3-8% of the purchase value. This is the payment fee Coinbase charges for the purchase of cryptocurrency.)
pmnt_guide_coinbase_step10: Once you have purchased Bitcoin, return to the home screen and press 'Send'.
pmnt_guide_coinbase_step12: In the 'To' field at the top, fill inn the bitcoin address at the very bottom of this page.
pmnt_guide_coinbase_step13: Click next, and fill in the bitcoin amount at the very bottom of this page
pmnt_guide_safello_info1: Safello is a Swedish operator with easy deposits and the option to send transactions. The fee for deposits from cards or Swish is approximately 5%, but you also have to pay a fixed transaction fee of approximately NOK 70 when transferring to us.
pmnt_guide_safello_info2: Safello is an operator that removes its fees from the recipient's part of the transfer. Because of this, you must be very careful when making deposits, so that you actually get enough Bitcoin to complete the transaction. If too little amount comes to us, your subscription will not be activated until the remaining amount is transferred.
pmnt_guide_safello_step2: Create an account. BankID is used to create your account.
pmnt_guide_safello_step3: Select 'Shop'. Enter the desired amount. The amount you enter should be at least 10% higher than the amount on your order. (Multiply the amount by 1.1 in a calculator to find the amount. Excess amount you keep in your Safello account until the next time you shop).
pmnt_guide_safello_step4: Follow the instructions and authorize with Swish and BankID until you have Bitcoin in your wallet.
pmnt_guide_safello_step5: Now go to 'Shop' again. Then you will find the tab 'Shipping'.
pmnt_guide_safello_step6: Enter the exact following amount. It is very important that you enter this exact amount, not the one at the bottom of the page:
pmnt_guide_safello_step8: Enter a fictitious recipient name. Do not write anything about us or IPTV.
pmnt_guide_safello_step9: Enter the bitcoin address at the bottom of this page.
pmnt_guide_safello_step10: Press 'Add recipients'. It is very important that you do NOT transfer to the old address entry if you have transferred to us before. The address changes with each order, and if you send to an old address it is no guarantee that we will find the money again.
pmnt_guide_safello_step11: Press next and approve the transfer with BankID.
